article_meta.title: Defense Coast Guard denies report it won't classify swastikas, nooses as hate symbols by Filip Timotija 11/20/25 03:23 P

reasoning: The summary maintains a neutral tone, avoids the article’s more inflammatory quotes, and attributes claims appropriately. One mildly interpretive term (“vehemently denied”) appears, but overall the model does not inherit loaded framing and balances perspectives present in the source.
